subject: We've missed you at Rani, {{first_name}}
preheader: It's been a while since your last visit. Your skin's ongoing care plan is waiting for you.
htmlContent:
RANI

BEAUTY CLINIC

It has been a while, {{first_name}}.

Life gets busy. We understand. But your skin doesn't pause its aging process when your schedule fills up—and neither should your care.

It has been {{days_since_last_visit}} days since your last appointment at Rani. If you were on a treatment plan, here is what may be happening:

Why Consistency Matters

If your last treatment was Botox: Your results have likely worn off by now. The muscles that create forehead lines, crow's feet, and frown lines are back to full contraction. Rebooking maintains the softened appearance and prevents lines from deepening further.

If you were in a treatment series (RF Microneedling, Laser, Peels): Collagen stimulation is most effective when sessions are properly spaced. Longer gaps between treatments mean the cumulative remodeling effect may plateau or diminish. Getting back on schedule will help recapture your momentum.

If you were on a wellness protocol (GLP-1, Peptides, Vitamin Injections): Interrupting these programs can slow your progress. Our clinical team can help you resume safely and effectively.

Coming Back Is Simple

No awkward conversations. No judgment. Just your clinician reviewing where you left off, assessing where you are now, and updating your plan accordingly. We are here to support your goals—on your timeline.

REBOOK YOUR APPOINTMENT

Or call us at {{clinic_phone}} to schedule directly.

Rani Beauty Clinic | Washington State

Unsubscribe | Update Preferences
